title: Guide to Speedboat Hire Licence in Benalmadena No for 2026
html:
Benalmadena No, on the Costa del Sol, offers speedboat hire with no licence required for boats under 15 horsepower; discover the coast from Puerto Deportivo de Benalmadena with prices from EUR 200 for a half-day trip with BoatHire24, the worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Benalmadena No or list your own.

Do you need a licence to rent a speedboat in Benalmadena No?

No, most speedboats under 15 horsepower can be rented without a licence in this part of Spain. Spanish regulations allow anyone aged 18 or over to operate a small motorboat (up to 15 HP) without a formal licence. The operator will confirm the exact requirements for each boat at the time of booking. For larger boats or those with more power, a valid recreational navigation licence may be required; always check with the provider. You can boat hire Benalmadena No for your chosen dates.

Where to set off in Benalmadena No

The main departure point is Puerto Deportivo de Benalmadena, a modern marina with easy access to the Mediterranean. Other nearby options include Puerto Marina, a famous harbour complex with shops and restaurants, and the small port of Fuengirola, five nautical miles south. You can also launch from Cabopino Marina, near Marbella, for a quieter start. Popular destinations include the Bay of Fuengirola, the Costa del Sol coastline, and the sheltered waters off Torremolinos, all within a short cruise.

Which boat to rent

  1. Olympic 490, a compact speedboat ideal for two to three people, perfect for a half-day coastal exploration; from EUR 200. See the Olympic 490 listing on BoatHire24.
  2. Quicksilver Activ 605 Open, a 6-metre open speedboat with a 150 HP engine, suitable for four to five guests; from EUR 350 for a half-day.
  3. Axopar 28, a versatile centre-console boat for up to eight, great for longer trips to Cala de Mijas; from EUR 500.
  4. Azimut 55, a luxury motor yacht with cabin space for six, perfect for a crewed full-day charter; from EUR 1,200.

BoatHire24 offers a wide range of vessels, including these models; you can compare verified boat listings for your preferred dates. One option worth a look is the Olympic 490 listing.

How much does it cost to rent a speedboat in Benalmadena No?

Prices vary by boat type and duration, but a half-day speedboat hire typically starts at EUR 200. Shared tours of the coast begin at about EUR 60 per person for a two-hour trip. A small motorboat (up to 15 HP) for a half-day costs around EUR 200 to EUR 400. A catamaran for a full-day charter for up to twelve guests runs from EUR 800. A crewed luxury yacht with a skipper starts at EUR 1,500 for a day.

When is the best season for speedboat hire in Benalmadena No?

The peak season for boating runs from June to September. During these months, the Mediterranean is calm, with average sea temperatures of 22, 26°C. The prevailing wind is the Poniente, a gentle westerly breeze that typically creates comfortable conditions for small boats. Spring and early autumn also offer excellent weather with fewer crowds. A blockquote of local advice follows.

Puerto Marina has a fuel dock and several boat rental offices; arrive early and book ahead in July and August to secure a boat.

At a glance

  • Price band: EUR 200 to EUR 1,500+ per day
  • Peak months: June, July, August, September
  • Trip length: half-day (4 hours) or full-day (8 hours)
  • Max capacity: 2 to 12 guests depending on boat
  • Currency: EUR
  • Licence requirement: none for boats under 15 HP

Questions about boat rental in Benalmadena No

Can I rent a speedboat without a licence in Benalmadena No?

Yes, many boats under 15 HP are available for hire without a licence; the rental company will provide a brief safety briefing.

What is the minimum age to rent a boat here?

You must be at least 18 years old to operate a rental boat, and a valid credit card is usually required for the deposit.

How far is it from Benalmadena to Fuengirola by boat?

The distance is about 5 nautical miles, a 20-minute cruise on a speedboat at moderate speed.

Is it safe to take a speedboat out on my own?

Yes, provided you follow the marina's instructions, stay within the designated areas, and check the weather forecast before departure.
